data.title: uniQure Announces Successful UK MHRA Pre-Submission Meeting for AMT-130 in Huntington’s Disease
data.description: An application for UK Marketing Authorization for AMT-130 is anticipated to be submitted in the third quarter of 2026.

data.title: Option Care Health Announces Financial Results for the First Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
data.description: Option Care Health, Inc., based in Bannockburn, Illinois, disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026. As the leading independent supplier of home and alternate site infusion services in the United States, the company trades on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol OPCH. This information was shared on April 30, 2026, indicating their position in the market.

data.title: Sanoma grows in Spain with acquisition of Vicens Vives, boosting its market share significantly.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global COVID-19 death toll has surpassed 5 million, with over 240 million confirmed cases worldwide. The United States has recorded the highest number of deaths, exceeding 750,000, followed by Brazil and India. The variant B.1.617.2, also known as the Delta variant, has been identified in several countries and is contributing to the increasing number of cases. Vaccination efforts continue globally, with over 6 billion vaccine doses administered.Experts emphasize the importance of getting vaccinated and following safety guidelines to curb the spread of the virus.
AC Immune reports strong financials in Q1 2026, with revenue increasing by 20% to $50 million. Corporate updates also announced.

data.title: Precision BioSciences to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 5, 2026
data.description: Precision BioSciences, Inc., listed as DTIL on Nasdaq, based in Durham, North Carolina, will release its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 and present a business update on May 5, 2026. The company focuses on utilizing its proprietary ARCUS® platform for in vivo gene editing therapies to address diseases with high unmet needs. Precision BioSciences, Inc. is dedicated to enhancing life through its clinical-stage gene editing endeavors.

data.title: Entegris Announces Appointment of Sukhi Nagesh as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: Entegris, Inc., a top supplier of critical advanced materials and process solutions for the semiconductor and high-technology sectors, appointed Sukhi Nagesh as its Chief Financial Officer ("CFO") as of May 18, 2026. Nagesh brings nearly three decades of experience in finance, investor relations, and corporate strategy at semiconductor and technology firms. The company's stock is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ENTG.

data.title: Domo and Formula 1 Driver Alex Albon Kick Off 2026 Season Showcasing How AI and Data Drive Elite Performance
data.description: In Silicon Slopes, Utah, Domo (NASDAQ: DOMO) has confirmed extending its partnership with Formula 1 driver Alex Albon for the 2026 Formula One World Championship season. The collaboration follows a strong debut in late 2025 and underscores a mutual commitment to leveraging data towards AI-driven results. Domo and Albon will embark on the new season united in their belief that optimal performance stems from harnessing the potential of raw data. The partnership aims to deliver impactful outcomes as businesses gear up for 2026.

data.title: CIBC Innovation Banking Provides €10m in Growth Financing to Embedded Insurance Platform Qover
data.description: In Brussels today, CIBC Innovation Banking disclosed that they have extended growth financing to Qover, a European embedded insurance platform. The investment aims to bolster Qover's ongoing expansion efforts. Qover specializes in coordinating embedded insurance solutions for businesses and insurers throughout Europe by utilizing a versatile, API-centric technology platform that grants distribution partners increased management over their insurance programs. This move highlights CIBC's commitment to fostering innovative ventures, with the funding injection set to facilitate Qover's trajectory towards further growth and development.

data.title: Diebold Nixdorf Reports First Quarter Financial Results; Strong Growth in Revenue, Adjusted EBITDA and Adjusted EPS, with Free Cash Flow More Than Tripling Year-over-Year
data.description: Diebold Nixdorf, a top player in revolutionizing banking and shopping experiences, released its Q1 2026 financial results. The company witnessed a 6% year-over-year revenue growth, with a sequential increase in backlog. They also saw a rise in adjusted EBITDA and expanded adjusted EBITDA margin compared to the previous year. Q1 set a new record for free cash flow, marking the sixth consecutive quarter of positive cash generation. Earnings per share showed growth both on a GAAP and non-GAAP basis year-over-year. Diebold Nixdorf reaffirmed its 2026 outlook. For more information, materials, and investor call details, visit http://www.dieboldnixdorf.com/earnings. The report was released in North Canton, Ohio, on April 30, 2026.
